urdu transliteration text:
Khuda ne jab Malakul Maut ko ye izn diyake roohe Hazrat-e-Sarwar nikaal kar le aa
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: When God gave the Angel of Death the order, to retrieve the soul ofImam Husayn (a)

urdu transliteration text:
Rahe khayaal ke, Shabbir ko na ho eeza.Husayn, Husayn, Husayn pehle hi zakhmo se chur chur hua
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: He (swt) told the angel to be mindful not to cause Husayn any more painHusayn is already wounded to the point of being broken into fragments

urdu transliteration text:
Malak pukara ye mujhse na ho sakega Khuda
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: The angel of death replied: "I cant do this deed, my God"

urdu transliteration text:
Main kis tarha se nikaloon, badan se jaan-e-Husaynbohat hi sakht he ya rab, ye imtehan-e-Husayn
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How do I take the soul of Husayn (a) from his body? My God, this trial of Husayn is already so difficult

urdu transliteration text:
Laga hai zakhm tabar, beh raha hai sar se lahoobhare hain khoon mein jaane rasool ke gesu
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Husayn (a) has been wounded with an axe, blood is gushing out of his headThe Prophet's son is drenched in blood

urdu transliteration text:
Qareeb jaake rakhun dil pe kis tarah qabooke is lahu mein to hai fatima ke doodh ki boo
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How do I keep my heart at ease when I go near Husayn (a)? When I can smell the fragrance of Fatima (a) in his blood?

urdu transliteration text:
Main kis tarha se nikaloon, badan se jaan-e-Husaynbohat hi sakht he ya rab, ye imtehan-e-Husayn
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How do I take the soul of Husayn (a) from his body? My God, this trial of Husayn is already so difficult

urdu transliteration text:
Nida ye aayi ke gardan se khainch jaan inkikaha mein kya kahu gardan pe chal rahi hai churi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Allah’s call was to, take Imam’s soul from his neck. The Angel replied, what can I say there is a knife slaughtering his neck!

urdu transliteration text:
Churi pakad ke ye chillati hay koi bibina zibha kar mere bacche ko mai dua doongi
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: There is a lady who keeps grabbing the knife while screaming: "Don't slaughter my Son, I will pray for you!"

urdu transliteration text:
Main kis tarha se nikaloon, badan se jaan-e-Husaynbohat hi sakht he ya rab, ye imtehan-e-Husayn
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How do I take the soul of Husayn (a) from his body? My God, this trial of Husayn is already so difficult

urdu transliteration text:
Nida ye aayi ke seene se qabz kar le jaankaha wo teeron se chalni hay ey mere Rehmaan
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Allah’s call was to, take Imam’s soul from his chest. The Angel replied, ‘His chest is filled with arrows, Oh Merciful Lord!’

urdu transliteration text:
Abhi to maarke barchi hata tha ek shaitanaur ab to hay tane zaanu e shimr ye Qur’an
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Just now one Satan has gotten up from hitting Husayn (a) with a spear, and now this Qur’an (Imam Husayn (a)) is under Shimr’s knees

urdu transliteration text:
Main kis tarha se nikaloon, badan se jaan-e-Husaynbohat hi sakht he ya rab, ye imtehan-e-Husayn
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: How do I take the soul of Husayn (a) from his body? My God, this trial of Husayn is already so difficult

urdu transliteration text:
Mutee e hukm hu par fikr ye hay ay Yazdaanhar ek uzr hay zakhmi lagaun haath kahan
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: God, I’m bound by your order, however this thought impedes my action: Every single body part of the Imam is wounded. Where do I place my hand to take out his soul?

urdu transliteration text:
Khuda pukara ye mushkil karenge Hum asaanna tu nikaal Mere Aashiqe Ghareeb ki jaan
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: God replied: ‘I will ease this difficult trial’.‘Oh Angel, do not take the soul of my poor, oppressed, loved servant (Husayn (a)).’

urdu transliteration text:
Mai Khud nikaal raha hoon badan se jaan-e-Husaynke khatm hone ko ab hay yeh imtehan-e-Husayn
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: I (Allah) Myself will extract the soul fromHusayn (a)'s body, so that this trial ofHusayn (a) can come to an end
